#====================================================================================================
# START - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================

# THIS SECTION CONTAINS CRITICAL TESTING INSTRUCTIONS FOR BOTH AGENTS
# BOTH MAIN_AGENT AND TESTING_AGENT MUST PRESERVE THIS ENTIRE BLOCK

# Communication Protocol:
# If the `testing_agent` is available, main agent should delegate all testing tasks to it.
#
# You have access to a file called `test_result.md`. This file contains the complete testing state
# and history, and is the primary means of communication between main and the testing agent.
#
# Main and testing agents must follow this exact format to maintain testing data. 
# The testing data must be entered in yaml format Below is the data structure:
# 
## user_problem_statement: {problem_statement}
## backend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.py"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## frontend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.js"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## metadata:
##   created_by: "main_agent"
##   version: "1.0"
##   test_sequence: 0
##   run_ui: false
##
## test_plan:
##   current_focus:
##     - "Task name 1"
##     - "Task name 2"
##   stuck_tasks:
##     - "Task name with persistent issues"
##   test_all: false
##   test_priority: "high_first"  # or "sequential" or "stuck_first"
##
## agent_communication:
##     -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##     -message: "Communication message between agents"

# Protocol Guidelines for Main agent
#
# 1. Update Test Result File Before Testing:
#    - Main agent must always update the `test_result.md` file before calling the testing agent
#    - Add implementation details to the status_history
#    - Set `needs_retesting` to true for tasks that need testing
#    - Update the `test_plan` section to guide testing priorities
#    - Add a message to `agent_communication` explaining what you've done
#
# 2. Incorporate User Feedback:
#    - When a user provides feedback that something is or isn't working, add this information to the relevant task's status_history
#    - Update the working status based on user feedback
#    - If a user reports an issue with a task that was marked as working, increment the stuck_count
#    - Whenever user reports issue in the app, if we have testing agent and task_result.md file so find the appropriate task for that and append in status_history of that task to contain the user concern and problem as well 
#
# 3. Track Stuck Tasks:
#    - Monitor which tasks have high stuck_count values or where you are fixing same issue again and again, analyze that when you read task_result.md
#    - For persistent issues, use websearch tool to find solutions
#    - Pay special attention to tasks in the stuck_tasks list
#    - When you fix an issue with a stuck task, don't reset the stuck_count until the testing agent confirms it's working
#
# 4. Provide Context to Testing Agent:
#    - When calling the testing agent, provide clear instructions about:
#      - Which tasks need testing (reference the test_plan)
#      - Any authentication details or configuration needed
#      - Specific test scenarios to focus on
#      - Any known issues or edge cases to verify
#
# 5. Call the testing agent with specific instructions referring to test_result.md
#
# IMPORTANT: Main agent must ALWAYS update test_result.md BEFORE calling the testing agent, as it relies on this file to understand what to test next.

#====================================================================================================
# END - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================



#====================================================================================================
# Testing Data - Main Agent and testing sub agent both should log testing data below this section
#====================================================================================================

user_problem_statement: "Test the OLT Management App backend APIs. This is a comprehensive FTTH operations management system with authentication, OLT monitoring, customer management, ONU management, fault management, AI support, and analytics features."

backend:
  - task: "Authentication System"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "All authentication endpoints working correctly. Operator login (operator@olt.com), Field Engineer login (field@olt.com), and /auth/me endpoint all functioning properly. JWT tokens generated and validated successfully."

  - task: "OLT Monitoring APIs"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "OLT monitoring endpoints fully functional. GET /api/olts returns 5 OLT devices, GET /api/olts/{id} retrieves specific OLT details, and GET /api/olts/{id}/ports returns 16 ports per OLT. All require authentication."

  - task: "Customer Management APIs"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "Customer management working perfectly. GET /api/customers returns 30 customers, search functionality works with query parameters, and GET /api/customers/{id} retrieves specific customer details. All endpoints require authentication."

  - task: "ONU Management APIs"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "ONU management APIs fully operational. GET /api/onus/customer/{customer_id} retrieves customer ONUs, GET /api/onus/{onu_id} gets specific ONU details, and POST /api/onus/{onu_id}/unbind-mac successfully unbinds MAC addresses with proper logging."

  - task: "Fault Management APIs"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "Fault management system working excellently. GET /api/faults retrieves all faults, filtering by status works, POST /api/faults creates new tickets (operator only), GET /api/faults/{id} gets specific fault details, and PUT /api/faults/{id} updates fault tickets. Role-based access properly enforced."

  - task: "AI Support APIs"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "AI chat endpoint working correctly. POST /api/ai/chat responds with detailed troubleshooting advice (2095 characters response). Uses Emergent LLM integration with GPT-5.2 model and proper context for FTTH operations."

  - task: "Analytics APIs"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "Analytics endpoints functioning properly. GET /api/analytics/faults returns fault statistics (16 total faults, 6.2% resolution rate) - operator only. GET /api/analytics/olts returns OLT health statistics (5 total OLTs, 80% health) - available to all authenticated users."

  - task: "Role-Based Access Control"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "Role-based access control working perfectly. Field engineers correctly blocked from creating fault tickets (403 error) and accessing fault analytics (403 error). Operators have full access to all features. Authentication required for all protected endpoints."

  - task: "Database Seeding"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "low"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "Database seeding working correctly. POST /api/seed endpoint properly seeds database with 2 users, 5 OLTs, 30 customers, 30 ONUs, and 15 fault tickets. Idempotent operation - returns 'Database already seeded' when called multiple times."

frontend:
  - task: "Frontend Testing"
    implemented: true
    working: "NA"
    file: "/app/frontend"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "low"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "Frontend testing not performed as per testing agent instructions. This is an Expo/React Native mobile app. Backend APIs are fully functional and ready for frontend integration."

metadata:
  created_by: "testing_agent"
  version: "1.0"
  test_sequence: 1
  run_ui: false

test_plan:
  current_focus:
    - "All backend APIs tested and verified"
  stuck_tasks: []
  test_all: true
  test_priority: "high_first"

agent_communication:
  - agent: "testing"
    message: "Comprehensive backend API testing completed successfully. All 24 test cases passed with 100% success rate. The OLT Management App backend is fully functional with proper authentication, role-based access control, and all CRUD operations working correctly. Database is seeded with test data. AI integration with Emergent LLM is operational. No critical issues found. System ready for production use."
